why_this_action: Fresh external distribution actions are already inside active measurement windows, so the best move available right now is to repair a high-intent lane instead of stacking another noisy outreach burst.
The StackOverflow lane was still re-hitting the Stack Exchange API after repeated 429s, which wasted cycles and risked corrupting next-lane selection.
A real cooldown guard preserves the existing high-fit answer asset while making future lane selection more honest.

repair_summary: Added a persisted 6-hour post-429 cooldown to the StackOverflow lane.
Made the lane reuse prior state during cooldown instead of re-querying Stack Exchange.
Taught the distribution selector to treat StackOverflow cooldown as a real constraint and mention the next retry time.

runtime_state.top_question: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

expected_outcome: The next active marketing slot should avoid wasting cycles on a still-limited StackOverflow discovery pass and make a cleaner lane choice while preserving the strongest existing answer asset.
replacement_condition: If StackOverflow is still cooling down or still unpostable after the next retry window, keep treating it as a preserved asset only and spend the next live slot on another executable high-intent lane instead of refreshing discovery again.
